plugins.name: claude-code-desktop-sync
plugins.description: Keeps MCP-server config in sync between Claude Code and Claude Desktop via a SessionStart hook, and reports the manual steps for anything that can't be auto-synced.

plugins.name: no-hidden-changes
plugins.description: Steer Claude toward visible, honest, reversible changes and away from hidden-state workarounds that make a tool's own UI look empty, absent, or deceptive.

plugins.name: measure-twice
plugins.description: Before building automation, survey for what already exists and match the mechanism's trigger to the event that makes it relevant. Sibling of no-hidden-changes.

plugins.name: resume-interrupted
plugins.description: Detects when your most recent session was cut off mid-task (usage limit, crash, or dropped connection) and proactively offers to pick up where you left off.
